subject: mighty mouse
body:
I have been trying to be extra cautious in not
involving myself in the mighty mouse affair( the
cartoon character that was always self  touted as  the
only one to "save the day"}....  I am conflicted in
whether or not I should make you aware of the some of
the real history ;,  he thought he would be dean of
the business school.nonsense!..  acording to larry ,
who refers to him as a "muppet" , the idea was self
generated and delusional.. as neil rudinstine the then
president ,  thought mm  a "windbag"..     the facts
are without dispute... I am hesitant to bring up his
true lack of "People skills "which I have heard
repeatedly touted as superb , , I am not sure you want
to be reminded that  he had not seen through , Jerry
GLazebrook.   an obviously goofy character that
eventually  threatened the family,,HArry could have
seen the obvious personality disorder, . I feel it
unnecessary to point out  that , it is my best
recollection that Jerry did not report to me.but to
mm. who while auditing your compensation for every
penny spent, approved 100's of thousand of dollars of
bogus invioces .I am concious of your affection for mm
,and am undecided if i should re- call to your
attention the fact that He believed whole heartedly in
Fred at the Hospital and was unable to see through
fred's obvious bullshit,,In negotiations actually
taking Fred's side..vs. me and Marshall ,Hwever It
didn't take JOhn Wolfe much time however,to make Fred
,I realize that you are aware that  he has alienated
your attorney, your chief of staff, your in house
counsel, your private secretary, your wife,,, , he is
about to piss of the wife of John Wolfe re, the
columbus foundation, as once again "process" takes
precedent over common sense,...also unfortunately  for
him  probably not a good career move,, I would like to
give him the benefit of the doubt , therefore he must
therefore have extraordinary businesss skills , to
compensate for the lack of people skills, but , it is
impossible to find a serious succesful transaction,
that he has completed in the past six years,,, he
screwed up sephora, He was about to stick you with a
100 million dollar loss with the accenture deal...( I
wrote to you so you would have a record of the
ludicrousness of the proposal...I don't want to
alienate you, so I am being as gentle as I can,,,but
he justdoesn't get it..}  yankee candle.. in which
forstmannn made over a billion dollars,,overpaid 
Fredick by a 100% ,compared to what he was willing to
take... ,ANd with pompousness and certainty  declared
categorically that the amazon business model was
doomed to failure , I can go on.. ..   I cherish our
freindship, and when it came time for Abigails
decision not to go to Dubai , I know how you think it
certain arenas, therefore I am sympathetic to your
needing a person to rely on for certain things however
and most importantly, the irrefutable truth is , he
lacks the trust of the people closest to you ,
including your wife, ,, Bruce donna sam dennis eddy,
,,,THis is crazy,,, None of the aforemetioned group,
beleives that  he would act in your best interest if
push came to shove..,,,THe triteness of the situation
can be illustarted  by the fact that  it is difficult
but necessary  for bruce to have to consistantly leave
the room as the only alternative left open to him so
he doesn't have to listen one more time to how "
without me,, things would be really fucked up"... You
probably will decide not to return my  calls for
awhile,,, I hope not ,  but I am confident in the end 
that you will acknowledge  the unfortunate reality,
and my corresponding responsibility to put it to paper


__________________________________________________

http://mail.yahoo.com

subject: mighty mouse
body: I have been extremely gracious in not involving myself in the mighty mouse affair( the cartoon chracter that was touted as  the only one to save the day}....  history ;,  he thought he would be dean of the business school... however acording to larry , who refers to him as a "muppet" , the idea was self generated and delusional.. as neil rudinstine thought mm was a "windbag"..     the facts are without dispute...   his "People skills which I have heard repeatedly touted , had allowed , Jerry GLazebrook.   an obviously goofy character to threaten the family,,, it is my best recollection that JErry did not report to me.but to mm. He believed whole heartedly in Fred at the Hospital and was unable to see through his bullshit,,, , he has alienated your attorny, your chief of staff, your in house counsel, your private secretary, your wife,,, , he is about to piss of the wife of John Wolfe...not a good career move,,He must therefore have extraordinary businesss skills , to compensate for the lack of people skills, but , it is impossoble to find a serious sucesful transcation, that he has completed in the past six years,,, he screwed up sephora, He was about to stick you with a 100 million dollar loss with the accenture deal...( I wrote to you so you would have a record of the ludicrousness of the proposal... he doen't get it..} underbid on yankee candle.. in which forstmannn made over a billion dollars,,overpaid  Fredick by a 100% ,compared to what he was willing to take... , declared categorically that the amazon business model was doomed to failure , I can go on.. ..  Most importantly, the irrefutable truth is , he lacks the trust of the people closest to you , including your wife, ,, Bruce donna sam dennis eddy, ,,,THis is crazy,,,I am sympathetic to the fact that you had great hopes for him and have relied on him to carry out, your instuctions,,, it is difficult for bruce to have to leave the room as the only alternative left to him so he doesn't have to listen one more time to how " without me,, things would be really fucked up"... YOu probably will decide not to return calls for awhile,, but I am confident that you recognize the unfortunate reality, and my corresponding responsibility to put it to paper
